subcodes.first_line: O thou who art consumed by the fire of separation from the Beauty of the Beloved of the horizons, the hearts of the people of unity are burned, as is the liver of every yearning soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سوخته آتش هجران فراق جمال محبوب آفاق قلوب اهل وفاق را سوخته و کبد هر مشتاق
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
